title: hieracium caesium subsp. obtusulum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. obtusulum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anticancer activities, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium caesium subsp. obtusulum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
